title: Chroma Names
description: Adds animated colored effects to the chat
body:
# Chroma Names

Add animated effects to your chat!

## Features

- Animated color effects
- Formatting
- Supports Minecraft default colors and custom HEX colors
- Server support
- GUI

**Default key to open the GUI is C**

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/chateffect <effect> <color1> <color2> <speed>` | Apply animated effects to the chat text |
| `/nameeffect <effect> <color1> <color2> <speed>` | Apply animated effects to the player's name |
| `/synceffect <effect> <color1> <color2> <speed>` | Apply animated effects to the chat text and player's name at the same time|
| `/chatformat add <formats>` | Apply formatting to the chat text|
| `/nameformat add <formats>` | Apply formatting to the player's name |
| `syncformat add <formats>` | Apply formatting to the chat text and player's name at the same time |
| `/chateffect clear` | Remove all effects on the chat text |
| `/nameeffect clear` | Remove all effects on the player's name |
| `/synceffect clear` | Remove all effects on the chat text and player's name |
| `/chatformat clear` | Remove all formatting on the chat text |
| `/nameformat clear` | Remove all formatting on the player's name |
| `/syncformat clear` | Remove all formatting on the chat text and player's name |


## ❤️ Support & Feedback
- **Join my Discord for help!**  [Discord](https://discord.gg/c8aagxeNty) 
- **Support me on**  [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/martigc)
